description_long: This object consists of a whole tomato with a leafy green calyx on top, and a sliced half showing the interior. The tomato is round and plump, with a smooth, slightly shiny red-orange skin. The sliced half reveals a juicy, seed-filled interior with radiating seed chambers and a moist, pulpy texture. The calyx is composed of several green, slightly curled leaves attached to the top of the whole tomato. A small tomato seed is also visible, separated from the main pieces. The overall appearance suggests freshness and ripeness, with no visible blemishes or damage.
description: A ripe, round tomato with a leafy green top and a sliced half revealing juicy, seed-filled flesh.
description_view_0: Shows both the whole tomato with leafy top and a sliced half exposing the interior and seeds.
description_view_1: Front view of the whole tomato, highlighting the leafy calyx and rounded shape.
description_view_2: Back view with the leafy top prominent and the sliced half showing the interior structure.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying both the leafy top and the cut surface with seeds and pulp.
